critical_steps.task: Check with TC to ensure the alarm is sent to Chubb, summon FSD if needed.
Check the status of Fire Protection System and trigger the fire alarm bells/siren if necessary.
Ascertain the location of smoke/fire.
If smoke or fire is observed in the public area, arrange to prevent passengers' access to the affected area.
Monitor ECS operation.
Activate the Station Evacuation Mode if necessary.
Incident Information Dissemination.
Arrange with TC for trains non-stopping.
Arrange with TC for empty trains to evacuate passengers in case the evacuation path is affected by smoke/fire.
Station Close & stoppage of incoming passengers.
Set up the Incident Control Post (ICP) at a proper location.
Provide assistance to disabled persons, elderly, or passengers in needs.
Warn other persons to keep away from the incident site.
Open Manual Service Gates/Emergency Service Gate/Emergency Exit Gates.
Change the running direction of Escalators/Travelators or stop them.
Stop escalators/travelators along evacuation path leading passengers to fire scene.
Identify passengers who may have difficulties in evacuation and assist them.
Direct passengers to leave the station.
Cordon off the incident site.
Inform all tenants to evacuate.
Check if Platform, Concourse, Subway are cleared of passengers.
Close all entrances/subways to prevent inflow of passengers and post Station Close notices.
Report closed entrances to SC/IO.
Set up Incident Control Post at proper location.
Appoint IOA.
Set up temporary telephone line at ICP.
Escort Emergency Services to incident site.
Set up access route.
Set up egress route.
Head-count personnel of tenants and working parties at assembly point.
